heading: Real audience data, not vanity metrics.

items.title: TikTok Studio Overview
items.context: Generated 57.9M video views, 4.8M likes, and over 317K shares, demonstrating strong organic reach and engagement on short-form platforms.

items.title: Top Performing TikTok Content
items.context: Consistent viral hits. Multiple videos reaching between 3.4M and 7.2M views individually by leveraging effective pacing and retention editing techniques.

items.title: YouTube Channel Analytics
items.context: Grew channel to over 16.4M total views and gained 16.7K+ subscribers, showing sustained cross-platform growth and long-form video success.

items.title: YouTube Monthly Audience
items.context: Maintained a monthly audience of 4M unique viewers, building a loyal community of regular viewers alongside a massive influx of new audiences.
